# Capture test corpus (TASK_10)

This directory contains fixtures used by the TASK_10 capture-completeness
tests. PDFs are generated programmatically (see `tests/integration/test_capture_corpus.py::test_*_fixture_gen`
or `tests/fixtures/capture/_gen.py`) so they can be regenerated on demand.

## Layout

| Path | Type | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `native.pdf` | PDF | Real native-text PDF — native text extraction works. |
| `scanned.pdf` | PDF | Synthetic scanned PDF: page rendered as image, no native text. |
| `mixed.pdf` | PDF | Mixed: page 1 native, page 2 scanned. |
| `multicolumn.pdf` | PDF | Two-column layout. |
| `tutorial.html` | HTML | Static HTML with code blocks (reuses `tests/fixtures/html/tutorial.html`). |
| `copy_button.html` | HTML | `<button data-clipboard-text>` payload test. |
| `lazy_load.html` | HTML | `data-src` lazy-loading test. |
| `native_plus_screenshot.html` | HTML | `<pre><code>` AND an inline screenshot of the same code — DOM priority test. |
| `decorative_mixed.html` | HTML | Decorative icon + content image mix. |

## Regeneration

PDFs are regenerated by the test suite if missing or if `_gen.py` is run.
HTML files are checked in.
